20:I[10752,["/_next/static/chunks/076f1ogf-il.v.js","/_next/static/chunks/11u.26kh8kw...js"],"ViewportBoundary"]
22:I[10752,["/_next/static/chunks/076f1ogf-il.v.js","/_next/static/chunks/11u.26kh8kw...js"],"MetadataBoundary"]
7:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Session-Based Isolation"}]
8:["$","p",null,{"children":["Each ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}]," instance is identified by a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}],". Different sessions maintain separate memory contexts:"]}]
9:["$","$L1a",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\n# Separate sessions with isolated memories\nuser_a_mem = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"user-alice\")\nuser_b_mem = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"user-bob\")\n\n# Alice's memories are isolated from Bob's\nuser_a_mem.remember(content=\"Alice prefers dark mode\", importance=0.5)\nuser_b_mem.remember(content=\"Bob prefers light mode\", importance=0.5)\n\n# Each user only recalls their own context\nuser_a_mem.recall(\"UI preferences\")  # Returns Alice's preferences\nuser_b_mem.recall(\"UI preferences\")  # Returns Bob's preferences\n","language":"python"}]
a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Scope-Based Access"}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":["Use the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scope"}]," parameter on ",["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}]," to control visibility within a session:"]}]
c:["$","$L1a",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"my-agent\")\n\n# Session-scoped (default) — only visible in this session\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"Current task: fixing bug #42\",\n  scope=\"session\",\n)\n\n# Global — visible across all sessions sharing the same DB\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"Company style guide link: ...\",\n  scope=\"global\",\n)\n","language":"python"}]
d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Multi-Tenant Pattern"}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":"Isolate tenants by using separate databases:"}]
f:["$","$L1a",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\n# Each tenant gets their own database file\ntenant_a = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"default\", db_path=\"/data/tenant-a/memories.db\")\ntenant_b = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"default\", db_path=\"/data/tenant-b/memories.db\")\n","language":"python"}]
10:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Filesystem Permissions"}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":"Since Mnemosyne stores data in local SQLite files, standard OS-level access controls apply:"}]
12:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Set restrictive file permissions on the database directory"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Use dedicated OS users for different agent services"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Place database files on encrypted filesystems if required"}],"\n"]}]
13:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L1b",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Local-Only by Default"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne does not expose a network API by default. All access is via the Python SDK, which means access control is governed by your application code and OS-level permissions."}]}]]}]]}]}]
